title: Web-uplift audit report
description: A modern-UX audit report for a single site: the explored paths, the findings (each tied to a violated principle and/or a Modern Web Guidance use case), and a prioritised task list.

mode.description: report = critique only; fix = source fixes were applied and the audit re-run

status.description: blocked = bot wall / login required; partial = some paths failed

evidenceUsed.description: The evidence modalities and tools the model actually ran for this audit (e.g. 'screenshot', 'layout-metrics', 'transition-video', 'heap-summary', 'dom+source', 'evaluate-probe', 'lighthouse', 'axe-core'). Makes the audit honest about its method, since method selection is the model's at inspection time, not pre-baked.

paths.description: The user paths / test cases exercised (mirrors the test plan).

conditions.description: Emulated conditions evaluated for this path (e.g. 'prefers-color-scheme: dark', 'viewport: 360x800', 'keyboard-only').

pathId.description: Which exercised path this finding came from.

url.description: Specific URL the finding applies to.

principleId.description: Principle violated, from principles/principles.json (e.g. adapt-to-the-user). Optional: a finding may be guidance-only.

principleCheckId.description: The specific check within the principle (e.g. respects-color-scheme).

guidanceId.description: Modern Web Guidance use-case id that addresses this (from `modern-web-guidance search`/`list`), e.g. dark-mode.

guidanceCategory.description: Guidance category (e.g. user-experience, performance, accessibility, css, forms).

summary.description: What diverges from the modern approach, in one or two sentences.

evidence.description: Concrete observation backing the finding (e.g. 'No color-scheme declared; background stays #fff under prefers-color-scheme: dark', or 'horizontal scrollbar at 360px viewport; .hero has width: 1200px').

suggestedFix.description: Concrete remediation following Modern Web Guidance, not a restatement of the problem (e.g. 'Add color-scheme: light dark and use light-dark() for surface colors; see guidance id dark-mode').

effort.description: Rough implementation effort, used for prioritisation.

taskList.description: Prioritised, deduplicated list of fixes derived from the findings (highest leverage first). The unit of work handed to fix mode.

status.description: Updated by fix mode as the hill-climb progresses.

auditPasses.description: How many audit passes ran (fix mode re-audits, so >1).
